jd_text: Job Description The role of Senior Operations Management Specialist involves: Enhancing the efficiency and effectiveness of operations management by developing and updating its related policies and controls, and accurately documenting processes in accordance with institutional standards. Conducting periodic reviews and performance analyses to ensure adaptability to changes, using techniques such as business process reengineering to improve quality and efficiency. It requires coordination with organizational units to ensure alignment of strategies with their needs, providing specialized training, and preparing comprehensive performance reports. Designing key performance indicators (KPIs) and performing necessary audits to verify the effectiveness of newly implemented processes. Qualifications Bachelor’s Degree in Industrial Engineering 9 Years of Experience Job Category Senior Management Advertiser Dubai Municipality Educational-level Bachelor Required Nationality UAE Only Monthly Salary Unspecified Schedule-Time Full time Job Posting 24/03/2026 Unposting Date 07/04/2026
